story.text:
# 💡 C6-C10 · Separation & Compression
**concept** · shared · knowledge

P^1.5 ↔ 96/64 as a structural relation (C6); multiplicative three-axis separation (C7); BRAID compression lowering the reconstruction ceiling R_max (C8); holographic-boundary sufficiency (C9); and an O(1) shared-parent term modifying k (C10).

## Edges in

- [[C11-C13 · Density, Hexagram & Witness]] *extends* →
- [[Separation Theorem]] *proves* →
